title: Xiaomi Xuanjie O1 Chip Shipments Exceed 1 Million
summary: Xiaomi announced at its Investor Day that shipments of its self-developed 3nm Xuanjie O1 chip have surpassed 1 million units, with plans to apply future chips in Xiaomi cars and release annual upgrades. This milestone marks Xiaomi's significant progress in self-developed chips, challenging established players and potentially reshaping the semiconductor landscape, especially with automotive applications. Xiaomi's large-chip project restarted in 2021 with a planned investment of at least 50 billion yuan over 10 years, and R&D spending on Xuanjie has exceeded 13.5 billion yuan as of April 2025.
context: The 3nm process is a leading-edge semiconductor manufacturing node that offers higher transistor density, better performance, and lower power consumption compared to previous nodes. Xiaomi's Xuanjie O1 is a self-developed chip using this advanced process, indicating the company's ambition to reduce reliance on external suppliers and compete in high-end chip design.

references.title: 3纳米制程 - 维基百科，自由的百科全书
